content.speakerText: How long can I keep the books?

options.text: You've got 2 weeks. After that, you'll get fined.
It depends on the book's popularity.
You can return them anytime without penalty.

content.explanation: 正确答案包含借期和逾期后果，符合图书馆规则。选项1错误地暗示无限期借阅；选项3虽然部分合理，但未明确期限和罚款，不符合标准回应要求；选项4完全错误，忽略了罚款机制。

content.speakerText: What if I can't return them on time?

options.text: You can keep them as long as you want.
You can renew them online if no one's waiting.
Just pay extra and keep them longer.
The library will send someone to collect them.

content.explanation: 正确答案强调续借的条件：无人预约。选项1错误地允许无限期借阅；选项3误导用户以为只需付费即可延长，不符合图书馆政策；选项4虚构了强制回收机制，不符合现实流程。

content.speakerText: Can I renew my books more than once?

options.text: Yes, as many times as you like.
Only once, unless someone else has requested the book.
No, renewals are not allowed at all.
You need to pay a fee for each renewal.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确反映了续借限制：通常仅允许一次，除非有他人预约。选项1错误地允许无限续借；选项3完全否定续借，不符合常见政策；选项4引入了付费机制，与标准规则不符。

content.template: The standard loan period is ___ days.
content.hint: 标准借期通常为两周，换算成天数
content.knowledgePoint: 数字与时间单位的对应表达

content.hint: 逾期罚款的常见金额表达
content.knowledgePoint: 罚款金额的固定表达方式

content.template: You can renew them online if no one's ___.
content.hint: 续借的关键条件：是否有他人预约
content.knowledgePoint: 续借条件的核心动词搭配（no one's waiting）

content.speakerText: How long can I keep the books?
expectedAnswers: You've got two weeks. After that, you'll be fined $1 per day.
The loan period is 14 days. Late returns cost one dollar daily.
Two weeks, and if you're late, there's a daily fine.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明借期和逾期后果
语言准确性：使用正确时态和单位（如days, $1）
表达自然度：符合口语习惯，避免机械背诵

content.speakerText: What if I can't return them on time?
expectedAnswers: You can renew them online if no one else has requested the book.
Renewal is allowed once, but only if there's no waiting list.
Try to renew it online — you can do it once unless someone else needs it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确说明续借条件和限制
语言准确性：正确使用条件句（if）和被动结构（has requested）
表达自然度：使用口语化表达如'Try to...'或'do it once'，避免生硬

content.speakerText: Can I renew my book twice?
expectedAnswers: No, only once — unless someone else has reserved it.
You're allowed one renewal only. If someone else wants it, you can't renew again.
Sorry, only one renewal is permitted. After that, you need to return it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确否定二次续借并说明例外情况
语言准确性：正确使用'only one renewal'和条件结构
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合图书馆工作人员的沟通风格
